checks.feature: parallel fin-like protrusions visible (check front/side view)
checks.notes: Front view (XZ) clearly shows multiple vertical fin protrusions rising from a base plate, all parallel to each other

checks.feature: heat-sink body with parallel fins visible (check front/side view)
checks.notes: Base plate is visible in front and isometric views with fins mounted on top, consistent with a heat sink design
Front view shows 8 distinct vertical fins clearly separated from each other, confirmed in isometric view as well

issues: Fins appear to be clustered only on the left half of the base (negative X region, approximately -30 to 0mm), leaving the right half of the base (0 to +30mm) without any fins - this is asymmetric and likely a placement error
The diagonal line visible in both top and front views suggests an unexpected geometry artifact or construction line that should not be present in the final model
Fin spacing and distribution appear uneven - fins are concentrated in roughly half the base length rather than distributed across the full 60mm base length
Base dimensions appear correct at 60x40mm but fin placement does not span the full base length as expected
